name: rudichat
description: Weird code salad Theoretically I want the service to work like this: Client and server already know each other's public keys         ↓ Client sends auth packet + ephemeral public key         ↓ Server verifies password/auth         ↓ Server sends its ephemeral public key         ↓ Both sides independently derive the same session key         ↓ No session key is ever transmitted
